## Investment View
ALSOG scores 77/100 as a constructive_bullish setup. The score is driven mainly by the technical breakout picture and ENTRY_READY status, with 1 constructive versus 0 adverse stock-specific signals and a market overlay impact of 5 supportive versus 5 adverse effects.

- Thesis: The setup is actionable only while the breakout level continues to hold and recent constructive signals, including the broader market overlay when relevant, keep getting follow-through.

## What Matters
- Price is holding above the prior 20-day high (40.40), a basic breakout confirmation signal. (high)
- Volume anomaly is strong at 2.21, which supports the move. (high)

## Risks / Invalidation
- A close back below 40.40 would weaken or invalidate the current breakout picture. (high)
- Broader market headwind remains relevant (Middle East conflict / defense tailwind): 2026-04-14: Péter Magyar vows to pursue those who ‘plundered’ Hungary after election win - The Guardian. (medium)
